ItacPersonItem.PersonalTitle: Comtesse de Le Jumel De Barneville
ItacPersonItem.Notes: Poetess and woman of letters, she was the author of historical novels. Joined the Ricovrati around 1698.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
